Package com.saperion.connector.options

package com.saperion.connector.options
Rendering options.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.saperion.connector
    This package contains the main classic connector classes.
    com.saperion.connector.options.paging
    Paging options for rendering.
  • Class
    Description
    AdditionalOptions
    Represents options that are not necessarily supported by the render engine in use.
    AdditionalOptions.AdditionalOptionsBuilder
    Build AdditionalOptions.
    Options
    A class that contains the options that are used to generate a rendition like target format timeout engine specific additional options This class implements a builder-pattern.
    Options.BuilderChain
    BuilderChain used to create a new Options instance.
    OptionsBuilder
    Builder interface for Options.
    PdfCompliance
    Compliance mode for PDF renditions.
    RedactionMode
    RedactionMode settings.
    Sources
    Utility class for provided source formats.
    Targets
    Contains constants and static methods to create and work with TargetFormats.
    TimeOut
    Represents a timeout for an operation.
    WatermarkAlignment
    Alignment options for watermarks.
    WatermarkText
    A text to use as watermark on a rendition.
    WatermarkTextStyle
    Styles for watermark-text.
